summary: Iteration 30 - Sijill Homepage Updates Testing COMPLETE. All features tested: new Ibn Khaldun quote, 6 cursus display, mobile hamburger menu, favicon. Fixed hardcoded '5 cursus' to '6 cursus' in CursusList.jsx during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 requested changes implemented and verified. Website rebuilt with vite build after fixing CursusList.jsx.

ibn_khaldun_quote.details: Quote displays: 'L'histoire consiste à méditer, à rechercher la vérité, à expliquer les causes et les origines des événements. Elle prend ainsi racine dans la philosophie, dont elle doit être comptée comme une branche.' by Ibn Khaldûn (al-Muqaddima)

hero_stats_6_cursus.details: Hero stats show '6' for Cursus count (first stat)

cursus_page_header.details: Changed hardcoded '5 Cursus disponibles' to '6 Cursus disponibles' in CursusList.jsx. Rebuilt with vite.

new_cursus_details.name: Pensées arabes non islamiques
new_cursus_details.description: Le Kalām chrétien, les logiciens de Bagdad et la philosophie juive de langue arabe, de Saʿadya Gaon à Maïmonide.

homepage_cursus_grid.details: All 6 cursus cards displayed with correct names, descriptions, and letter indicators (A-F)

favicon_svg.details: SVG favicon with Sijill branding (S. in green) exists and loads correctly

mobile_hamburger_visible.details: Mobile hamburger menu button [data-testid='mobile-menu-btn'] visible on mobile viewport

mobile_menu_overlay.details: Mobile menu overlay opens with 'open' class when hamburger clicked

mobile_menu_closes_on_nav.details: Mobile menu closes automatically when a navigation link is clicked

desktop_nav_visible.details: Desktop navigation [data-testid='desktop-nav'] visible on desktop viewport

desktop_nav_hidden_on_mobile.details: Desktop navigation hidden on mobile viewport

tests_passed: All nav links present in mobile menu

fix_applied.change: Changed '5 Cursus disponibles' to '6 Cursus disponibles'
fix_applied.rebuild: Ran 'npx vite build' to rebuild website-react/dist
